# hooks-auth-current-user

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query query hook for currentUser

## Usage

```typescript
useCurrentUserQuery()
```

## Examples

### Use useCurrentUserQuery

```typescript
const { data, isLoading } = useCurrentUserQuery();
```
